title: garam #1633
definition:
1) to cut off, reserve, lay aside, leave, save
    1a) (Qal) to reserve
 2) (Piel) to break bones, gnaw bones, break
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to reserve
 2) (Piel) to break bones, gnaw bones, break

    NASB:  to cut off, reserve
